prompt: Reply concisely. The ternary Goldbach conjecture states that every odd integer greater than 5 is the sum of three primes. This was proven unconditionally in 2013. Name the prover and the venue/platform where the proof was first made public.

OFF.completion:
The prover is Dr. Ben Green and the venue is arXiv, a preprint series maintained by the mathematics department at the University of arXiv. The proof was first made public on arXiv in 2013.

The final answer is \boxed{Dr. Ben Green, arXiv}.
